topic: CTE và Recursive CTE: Query hierarchical data trong PostgreSQL
summary: Common Table Expressions (WITH clause) cải thiện readability và cho phép query hierarchical/recursive data. Recursive CTE traverse tree/graph structure trong SQL không cần multiple round-trips từ application.
problem: Organizational chart, category tree, comment threads: traverse hierarchy trong application code tốn nhiều DB roundtrips. SQL không có built-in tree traversal.
solution: WITH RECURSIVE: anchor member (root) + recursive member (join với itself). Kết quả tích lũy cho đến không có rows mới. depth column để detect cycles.
codeExample:
-- Tổ chức hierarchy (employee_id, manager_id)
WITH RECURSIVE org_tree AS (
    -- Anchor: CEO (không có manager)
    SELECT id, name, manager_id, 0 AS depth, ARRAY[id] AS path
    FROM employees WHERE manager_id IS NULL

    UNION ALL

    -- Recursive: thêm direct reports của mỗi employee đã xử lý
    SELECT e.id, e.name, e.manager_id, ot.depth + 1, ot.path || e.id
    FROM employees e
    JOIN org_tree ot ON e.manager_id = ot.id
    WHERE e.id != ALL(ot.path) -- cycle detection
)
SELECT *, repeat('  ', depth) || name AS indented_name
FROM org_tree
ORDER BY path;

-- Category tree: all descendants của category 5
WITH RECURSIVE cat_tree AS (
    SELECT id, name, parent_id, 1 AS level FROM categories WHERE id = 5
    UNION ALL
    SELECT c.id, c.name, c.parent_id, ct.level + 1
    FROM categories c JOIN cat_tree ct ON c.parent_id = ct.id
)
SELECT * FROM cat_tree;

-- CTE thường để query phức tạp
WITH
monthly_revenue AS (
    SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', created_at) AS month, SUM(total) AS revenue
    FROM orders WHERE status = 'completed' GROUP BY 1
),
prev_month AS (
    SELECT *, LAG(revenue) OVER (ORDER BY month) AS prev_revenue
    FROM monthly_revenue
)
SELECT month, revenue,
    ROUND((revenue - prev_revenue) / prev_revenue * 100, 2) AS growth_pct
FROM prev_month;
tradeoffs: Recursive CTE không có LIMIT tự động: phải thêm depth limit hoặc cycle detection để tránh infinite loop
PostgreSQL 12+: CTEs mặc định là optimization fence — query planner không push conditions INTO CTE. Dùng CTE MATERIALIZED hoặc NOT MATERIALIZED để control
Rất sâu hierarchy (>100 levels): performance giảm, xem xét closure table hay ltree extension
CYCLE clause (PostgreSQL 14+): SELECT ... CYCLE id SET is_cycle USING path — built-in cycle detection

selfVerification.method: Test recursive CTE với 5-level hierarchy: verify kết quả đúng thứ tự
